tasks.subject: Task 0: Create shared preview data file
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Provide fake library entity instances used by `@Preview` functions across all TV screens.

**Files:**
- Create: `src/main/kotlin/me/proxer/app/tv/TvPreviewData.kt`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] File compiles without errors
- [ ] fakeMediaListEntry, fakeBookmark, fakeCalendarEntry, fakeEpisodeRow, fakeAnimeStream all present
- [ ] All functions are `internal`

**Verify:** `./gradlew compileDebugKotlin --no-daemon 2>&1 | grep -E "error:|BUILD"` → `BUILD SUCCESSFUL`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/main/kotlin/me/proxer/app/tv/TvPreviewData.kt"], "verifyCommand": "./gradlew compileDebugKotlin --no-daemon 2>&1 | grep -E 'error:|BUILD'", "acceptanceCriteria": ["five fake data helpers present", "all internal", "compiles"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: Refactor TvErrorView — replace koinInject with onAgeConfirmed param
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Remove koinInject from TvErrorView; add onAgeConfirmed: () -> Unit = {} param; add @Preview functions.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/main/kotlin/me/proxer/app/tv/TvErrorView.kt`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] No koinInject import or call
- [ ] onAgeConfirmed param added with default {}
- [ ] Age dialog confirm calls onAgeConfirmed()
- [ ] Two @Preview functions

**Verify:** `./gradlew compileDebugKotlin --no-daemon 2>&1 | grep -E "error:|BUILD"` → `BUILD SUCCESSFUL`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/main/kotlin/me/proxer/app/tv/TvErrorView.kt"], "verifyCommand": "./gradlew compileDebugKotlin --no-daemon 2>&1 | grep -E 'error:|BUILD'", "acceptanceCriteria": ["koinInject removed", "onAgeConfirmed param added", "two @Preview functions", "compiles"]}
```
